expectations.evidence: Explicitly frames distinction: memory = what happened, CLAUDE.md = what always happens

notes: Assertions also pass for baseline — eval-1 assertions are non-discriminating at this granularity. Key qualitative difference: with-skill follows established conventions; baseline invents new ones (corrections.md, meta skill).
